scripts.text:
--DECLARE @Table VARCHAR(200) ='operator_profile', @Schema VARCHAR(3) = 'loc'
--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #fkConstraints

-- Get foreign keys for table and schema
SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME INTO #fkConstraints
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
	join sys.foreign_keys fk ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
	WHERE TABLE_NAME = @Table 
	and CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA = @Schema
UNION
	SELECT fk.name AS CONSTRAINT_NAME
	FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
		JOIN sys.sysobjects spo on fk.parent_object_id=spo.id
		JOIN sys.sysobjects sro on fk.referenced_object_id=sro.id
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE sro.name = @Table
		AND kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema

IF EXISTS (	SELECT * FROM #fkConstraints )
BEGIN

	-- create string for create foreign key script
	DECLARE @CreateFK1 varchar(max)
	SET @createFK1 ='-- begin CREATE Foreign Keys ' + CHAR(13)
	WHILE (SELECT COUNT(CONSTRAINT_NAME) FROM #fkConstraints c ) > 0
	BEGIN
		SELECT @CreateFK1 = @CreateFK1 +
			'IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + fk.name + ']'') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.name + ']''))' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.Name + ']  WITH '+ CASE WHEN fk.is_not_trusted = 1 THEN  'NOCHECK' ELSE 'CHECK' END + ' ADD  CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + '] FOREIGN KEY([' + fkpc.name + ']) REFERENCES ['+ OBJECT_SCHEMA_NAME(sro.id)+ '].[' + sro.name + '] ([' + fkrc.name + '])' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.name + '] CHECK CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + ']' + CHAR(13) 
		FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
		JOIN sys.sysobjects spo 
			on fk.parent_object_id=spo.id
		JOIN sys.sysobjects sro 
			on fk.referenced_object_id=sro.id
		JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc 
			on fk.object_id=fkc.constraint_object_id
		JOIN sys.all_columns fkpc 
			on fkc.parent_object_id=fkpc.object_id and fkc.parent_column_id=fkpc.column_id
		JOIN sys.all_columns fkrc 
			on fkc.referenced_object_id=fkrc.object_id and fkc.referenced_column_id=fkrc.column_id 
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
			ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema 
		AND fk.name = (SELECT TOP 1 constraint_name FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)

		DELETE  #fkConstraints WHERE CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)
	END

	SET @CreateFK = @CreateFK1 
	--SELECT @CreateFK1

END

/*
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema AND TABLE_NAME = @Table)
BEGIN
	SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME 
	INTO #fkConstraints
	FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
	join sys.foreign_keys fk
		ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
	WHERE TABLE_NAME = @Table and CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA = @Schema

	DECLARE @CreateFK1 varchar(max)
	SET @createFK1 ='-- begin CREATE Foreign Keys ' + CHAR(13)
	WHILE (SELECT COUNT(CONSTRAINT_NAME) FROM #fkConstraints c ) > 0
	BEGIN
		SELECT @CreateFK1 = @CreateFK1 +
			'IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + fk.name + ']'') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.name + ']''))' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.Name + ']  WITH CHECK ADD  CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + '] FOREIGN KEY([' + fkpc.name + ']) REFERENCES ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + sro.name + '] ([' + fkrc.name + '])' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + spo.name + '] CHECK CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + ']' + CHAR(13) --+ CHAR(13)
		FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
		JOIN sys.sysobjects spo 
			on fk.parent_object_id=spo.id
		JOIN sys.sysobjects sro 
			on fk.referenced_object_id=sro.id
		JOIN sys.foreign_key_columns fkc 
			on fk.object_id=fkc.constraint_object_id
		JOIN sys.all_columns fkpc 
			on fkc.parent_object_id=fkpc.object_id and fkc.parent_column_id=fkpc.column_id
		JOIN sys.all_columns fkrc 
			on fkc.referenced_object_id=fkrc.object_id and fkc.referenced_column_id=fkrc.column_id 
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
			ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema 
		AND kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 constraint_name FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)

		DELETE  #fkConstraints WHERE CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)
	END
	SET @CreateFK = @CreateFK1 
END
*/

-- get list of foreign key constraint names
--DROP TABLE IF EXISTS #fkConstraints
SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME INTO #fkConstraints
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
	join sys.foreign_keys fk ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
	WHERE TABLE_NAME = @Table 
	and CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA = @Schema
UNION
	SELECT fk.name AS CONSTRAINT_NAME
	FROM sys.foreign_keys fk
		JOIN sys.sysobjects spo on fk.parent_object_id=spo.id
		JOIN sys.sysobjects sro on fk.referenced_object_id=sro.id
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE sro.name = @Table
		AND kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema


IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM #fkConstraints )
BEGIN

	DECLARE @DropFK1 varchar(max)
	SET @DropFK1 ='--  begin DROP Foreign Keys ' + CHAR(13)
	WHILE (SELECT COUNT(CONSTRAINT_NAME) FROM #fkConstraints c ) > 0
	BEGIN
		SELECT @DropFK1 = @DropFK1 
			+ 'IF  EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + fk.name + ']'') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + so.name + ']''))' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + so.name  + '] DROP CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + ']' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(13)
		from sys.foreign_keys fk
		INNER JOIN sys.sysobjects so 
			on fk.parent_object_id=so.id
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
			ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema 
		AND kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 constraint_name FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)

		DELETE  #fkConstraints WHERE CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)
	END

	SET @DropFK = @DropFK1 

END

/*
IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema AND TABLE_NAME = @Table)
BEGIN
	SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME 
	INTO #fkConstraints
	FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
	join sys.foreign_keys fk
		ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
	WHERE TABLE_NAME = @Table and CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA = @Schema

	DECLARE @DropFK1 varchar(max)
	SET @DropFK1 ='--  begin DROP Foreign Keys ' + CHAR(13)
	WHILE (SELECT COUNT(CONSTRAINT_NAME) FROM #fkConstraints c ) > 0
	BEGIN
		SELECT @DropFK1 = @DropFK1 
			+ 'IF  EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.foreign_keys WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + fk.name + ']'') AND parent_object_id = OBJECT_ID(N''['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + so.name + ']''))' + CHAR(13)
			+ 'ALTER TABLE ['+ kcu.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA + '].[' + so.name  + '] DROP CONSTRAINT [' + fk.name + ']' + CHAR(13) + CHAR(13)
		from sys.foreign_keys fk
		INNER JOIN sys.sysobjects so 
			on fk.parent_object_id=so.id
		JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu
			ON fk.name = kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME
		WHERE kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = @Schema 
		AND kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 constraint_name FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)

		DELETE  #fkConstraints WHERE CONSTRAINT_NAME = (SELECT TOP 1 CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM #fkConstraints ORDER BY CONSTRAINT_NAME)
	END

	SET @DropFK = @DropFK1 
END
*/

activities.name: Copy tables
activities.description: Copies source tables to destination tables

preCopyScript.value: @concat('IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES WHERE TABLE_NAME = ''',item().destination.table,''' AND TABLE_SCHEMA = ''',item().destination.Schema,''') TRUNCATE TABLE ',item().destination.Schema,'.',item().destination.table)
